fields.label: Key ID
fields.helpText: From cloud.higgsfield.ai/api-keys -- the left half of your KEY_ID:KEY_SECRET pair.

fields.label: Key Secret
fields.helpText: From cloud.higgsfield.ai/api-keys -- the right half of the pair. Treat like a password.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates the KEY_ID:KEY_SECRET pair against Higgsfield. If /v1/me returns 404 verify the canonical health endpoint with the official SDK at github.com/higgsfield-ai/higgsfield-js.

metadata.summary: Higgsfield AI generative image and video platform with hosted models including Soul 2.0, Nano Banana Pro, Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Kling 3.0, and 30+ more. Supports REST API access (programmatic) and a hosted MCP server (account OAuth, no API key).
metadata.setup_guide:
Path A -- REST API (recommended for personas templates):
1. Sign up at cloud.higgsfield.ai and pick a plan (free tier available).
2. Go to cloud.higgsfield.ai/api-keys and click 'Create API key'.
3. Copy both halves -- KEY_ID and KEY_SECRET (combined format: KEY_ID:KEY_SECRET).
4. Paste KEY_ID into the first field and KEY_SECRET into the second.

Path B -- Hosted MCP server (OAuth via your Higgsfield account):
1. Sign up at higgsfield.ai.
2. Add a custom MCP connector in your agent client with URL https://mcp.higgsfield.ai/mcp.
3. Click Connect and sign in with your Higgsfield account.
4. The MCP server brokers requests against the same generation engine and bills the same credit pool as the REST API. Vendor-side OAuth is outside the standard PROVIDER_REGISTRY flow today; use the REST path for fully wired personas templates.

llm_usage_hint.overview: Higgsfield REST API for image and video generation. Auth header: 'Authorization: Key $HIGGSFIELD_KEY_ID:$HIGGSFIELD_KEY_SECRET'. Base URL: https://platform.higgsfield.ai. POST /v1/generations starts both image and video jobs (differentiated by the 'task' parameter). Polling: GET /requests/{request_id}/status. Status values: queued, in_progress, nsfw, failed, completed -- nsfw refunds credits but still consumes a slot.
examples: curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Key $HIGGSFIELD_KEY_ID:$HIGGSFIELD_KEY_SECRET" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"task":"text-to-image","model":"flux-pro/kontext/max","prompt":"A futuristic cityscape at dusk","aspect_ratio":"16:9"}' https://platform.higgsfield.ai/v1/generations
# Soul 2.0 -- humans-with-products UGC. Nano Banana Pro -- product accuracy. Sora 2 / Veo 3.1 / Kling 3.0 -- video. Flux Pro -- general text-to-image.
gotchas: Auth header is 'Key' not 'Bearer' -- the official V2 SDK uses 'Authorization: Key KEY_ID:KEY_SECRET'.
Generation is async: POST returns immediately with a request_id; poll status until 'completed'. Default poll interval ~2s, max wait ~5min in the SDK.

Credit cost varies per model and resolution -- check remaining credits at cloud.higgsfield.ai before bulk generation. NSFW moderation refunds credits but still consumes a slot, so design templates to handle that status separately from 'failed'.
Webhook callbacks are supported via ?hf_webhook=<url> on the request URL when push notification is preferred over polling.

The hosted MCP path at https://mcp.higgsfield.ai/mcp uses vendor OAuth and bills the same credit pool, but is outside the standard PROVIDER_REGISTRY flow -- prefer the REST path inside personas templates.

auth_methods.label: Hosted MCP (account OAuth)
auth_methods.note: Vendor-side OAuth via Higgsfield account. No personas-stored credential required. Hosted-MCP-with-vendor-OAuth runtime support is partial today; the catalog entry exists for discoverability and the field-only manual configuration path.
